poems.title: Love's Whisper
poems.content:
In the quiet moments of the dawn,
When the world is still and new,
I find myself thinking of you,
And how my heart has been drawn.

To your smile, your gentle grace,
The way you light up every room,
You chase away all of my gloom,
And bring sunshine to this place.
poems.author: Amar Sheriff

poems.title: Rise Above
poems.content:
When the road ahead seems steep and long,
And doubt creeps in like morning mist,
Remember that you are strong,
A warrior who will persist.

Every setback is a setup,
For a comeback even greater,
So stand tall and never let up,
Your dreams will come to you later.
poems.author: Your Name

poems.title: Forever Yours
poems.content:
Through seasons that come and go,
Through rain and sun and snow,
My love for you continues to grow,
This much I want you to know.

You are my heart, my soul, my song,
The place where I belong,
With you is where I'm strong,
Forever, all life long.
poems.author: Your Name

quotes.text: Love is not about how many days, months, or years you have been together. It's about how much you love each other every single day.
quotes.author: Your Name

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Your Name

quotes.text: In your eyes, I found my home. In your heart, I found my love. In your soul, I found my mate.
quotes.author: Your Name

quotes.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
quotes.author: Your Name

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do. Stay passionate, stay driven, stay focused.
quotes.author: Your Name
